title: Ghost Exorcist
description:
Ghost Exorcist is a progression-based action game where you purify wandering spirits and collect their souls.

Use the souls you gather to strengthen your abilities through a skill tree, increase your power, and challenge increasingly dangerous ghosts.

Features:

• Purify hostile ghosts and collect their souls

• Upgrade your character through a progression-based skill tree

• Strengthen your abilities with permanent upgrades

• Face stronger enemies as your power grows

• Simple action-focused gameplay with continuous character progression

Guide restless spirits to their final rest and become a legendary exorcist.
description_short: Purify ghosts and collect their souls. Grow stronger with every soul you gather, unlock powerful upgrades through the skill tree, and guide restless spirits to their final rest in this progression-driven action game.
